item.title: Anyscale raises $100M to scale Ray-based AI infrastructure
item.description: Anyscale, the company behind the Ray distributed computing framework, announced a $100M Series C to expand its managed infrastructure platform for AI workloads.

item.title: New startup promises to fix data observability with AI agents
item.description: DataWatch emerges from stealth with a $12M seed round to bring autonomous data quality monitoring to modern data stacks.

item.title: Celebrity opens new restaurant in New York
item.description: A famous actor opened a new dining establishment.
